upstream_note: v2: full 6x6. Top-level cells are the openai-egress row for v1 compatibility; the full grid is under upstreams.<egress>.cells keyed by ingress dialect.
egress_configured: openai openai-responses anthropic gemini cohere bedrock
cap_note: Portkey accepts OpenAI and Anthropic ingress into any provider but has no chat-to-Responses bridge (only the Responses passthrough diagonal); other cells are grey by that capability limit

openai.verdict_note: HTTP 200, passthrough (same dialect, no translation required); round trip to the mock's openai endpoint confirmed

openai-responses.verdict_note: Portkey accepts OpenAI and Anthropic ingress into any provider but has no chat-to-Responses bridge (only the Responses passthrough diagonal); other cells are grey by that capability limit

anthropic.verdict_note: HTTP 500 on POST /v1/messages: bad no anthropic envelope ("type":"message" + content array)

hardware: AWS m7g.2xlarge (Graviton3, 8 cores / 32 GB). Gateway pinned to 4 cores, mock+loadgen on the other 4, Ubuntu 24.04. One dedicated box per gateway.
